Hey Joe, congrats on finishing the orientation! One last step before you can pick up Circle K shifts — complete your background check. Open the Shiftsmart app and tap the "Start Background Check" card on your home screen. It takes about 5 minutes, and shifts usually open up within 24 hours after it clears.

Reply HELP if you have any questions!
